---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for BridgeLink Webadmin
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Webadmin Build Number** *(required — found under "About BridgeLink" in the left navigation menu)*

<!-- Enter your build number here, e.g. 4.6.0-build.1234 -->

**Is your request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would address.

**Describe Your Use Case**
Explain the workflow or scenario where this feature would be useful.

**Proposed Solution**
Describe what you would like to see added or changed.

**Alternatives Considered**
Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you have already explored.

**Additional Context**
Any other context, mockups, or screenshots relevant to the request.
